executives.name: Kimberly Greene
executives.background: Ms. Greene is chairman, president and CEO of Georgia Power. She previously served as chairman, president and CEO of Southern Company Gas and as Southern Company's chief operating officer.

executives.name: Paulett Eberhart
executives.background: CEO of HMS Ventures. Former President and CEO of Invensys Process Systems.

executives.name: Randall Weisenburger
executives.background: Mr. Weisenburger is the Managing Member of Mile 26 Capital LLC. He was previously the CFO of Omnicom Group Inc. and a founding member of Wasserstein Perella & Co.

executives.name: Rayford Wilkins, Jr.
executives.background: Former CEO of Diversified Businesses of AT&T Inc.
